title: Create: Maximized additions
description: Some components added for the Create: Maximized modpack, now available for everyone!
body:
Create: Maximized additions adds many new decorations and components made for te create: Maximized modpack found [here](https://modrinth.com/modpack/create-maximized). It adds decorations such as the 6 Quartz Lamp variants, along with a new wood type and biome, maple, matching the colors of copper casing. It also adds a new component, polished Nether Quartz. 

# Attention!
This mod has a lot of dependencies. Keep note of these.
